login.title: Sign In
login.description: Sign in to access the invoice management system

adminFirms.title: Firms
adminFirms.createDescription: Create a new firm along with its first user.
adminFirms.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{firmName}"? This action cannot be undone.

users.title: Users
users.createDescription: Add a new user to your firm.
users.editDescription: Update the user's information and profile.
users.newPasswordHint: Leave blank to keep the current password
users.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{userName}"? This action cannot be undone.

customers.title: Customers
customers.createDescription: Add a new customer to your firm.
customers.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.

invoices.title: Invoices
invoices.createDescription: Create a new invoice for your customer.
invoices.linesRequiredError: You must add at least one line and fill in the item name
invoices.selectCustomerDescription: Select an existing customer for the invoice, or add a new one.
invoices.selectCustomerSearchPlaceholder: Search by name or tax number...
invoices.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete invoice "{invoiceNumber}"? This action cannot be undone.
invoices.belowMinimumHint: Amount is below the allowed minimum of {min}
invoices.aboveMaximumHint: Amount is above the allowed maximum of {max}

profiles.title: Profiles
profiles.createDescription: Create a new permission profile for your firm.
profiles.editDescription: Update the profile's permissions and limits.
profiles.invoiceSettingsDisabledHint: These settings only apply when invoice create or update permission is granted
profiles.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.

errors.CANNOT_DELETE_OWN_ACCOUNT: You cannot delete your own account
errors.CANNOT_EDIT_OWN_ACCOUNT: You cannot edit your own account or profile
errors.FIRM_HAS_RECORDS_CANNOT_DELETE: This firm cannot be deleted because it has customers or invoices on record
errors.PROFILE_IS_SYSTEM_CANNOT_MODIFY: The system profile cannot be edited or deleted
errors.PROFILE_HAS_USERS_CANNOT_DELETE: This profile cannot be deleted because it has users assigned to it
errors.PROFILE_STRONGER_THAN_CALLER: This profile is stronger than your own permissions, so you cannot edit it
errors.CANNOT_GRANT_BEYOND_OWN_PERMISSIONS: You cannot grant a permission you don't have
errors.READ_PERMISSION_REQUIRED_FOR_MUTATION: Granting create/update/delete on a resource also requires read access
errors.INVOICE_RANGE_INVALID: The minimum amount cannot be greater than the maximum amount
errors.INVALID_TAX_NUMBER_FORMAT: Tax number must contain only digits
errors.CUSTOMER_TAX_NUMBER_ALREADY_EXISTS: A customer with tax number "{taxNumber}" is already registered
errors.CUSTOMER_HAS_INVOICES_CANNOT_DELETE: This customer cannot be deleted because it has invoices on record
errors.INVOICE_NUMBER_ALREADY_EXISTS: An invoice with number "{invoiceNumber}" already exists
errors.INVOICE_REQUIRES_AT_LEAST_ONE_LINE: An invoice must contain at least one line item
